summary: Adding two vectors places them tip to tail; the sum is the single vector from the start of the first to the end of the second. Algebraically you just add matching components.
formulas: u + v = (u₁ + v₁, u₂ + v₂, u₃ + v₃)
method: Make sure both vectors have the same dimension.
Add the first components, then the second, then the third.
